prestazioni: M840T 4.0L twin-turbo V8 engine: Full titanium internals upgrade with forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance to handle 1,200+ HP on E85 fuel. Pair with a custom McLaren GT3-derived dry sump system from Peterson Fluid Systems for sustained high-G cornering.

Precision Turbo & Engine GTW4202R Gen2 turbochargers (76mm, 9-blade billet wheel) with TiAL Sport MV-R 44mm wastegates and a custom 4.5" titanium downpipe system from Armytrix, featuring 304 stainless steel flex sections and a secondary O2 delete for unfiltered airflow. Matched with a Pectel SQ6M ECU reflash for 35 psi peak boost and a 9,500 RPM redline.

Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), paired with McLaren Motorsport-spec carbon fiber anti-roll bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and spherical bearing end links from SuperPro. Full chassis reinforcement via a Weldon Racing bolt-in roll cage (FIA 8862-2018 certified) with integrated gussets for torsional rigidity.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody conversion kit (carbon fiber, 720S-specific), featuring extended front fenders with integrated canards, a vented rear quarter panel, and a 50mm wider rear track. Matched with a custom Vorsteiner GTR Series front splitter and a McLaren P1-inspired GT3 rear wing (carbon fiber, 1,800mm span) with active Gurney flap from Dymag.

Full bespoke livery by Driven Art, replicating the 1995 McLaren F1 GTR Le Mans winner (Gulf Oil #59) with 3M 1080 vinyl wrap (Matte Pacific Blue base, Signal Orange accents) and hand-painted gold pinstriping. Carbon fiber side skirts from Seibon with integrated LED running lights (Lux H8 V4, 6,000K) and a custom titanium exhaust finisher from Akrapović.

OMP Racing carbon fiber bucket seats (FIA 8862-2009 homologated) with 6-point Schroth Profi II harnesses, wrapped in Nappa leather with Alcantara suede inserts (McLaren Orange stitching). Full interior carbon fiber trim from V Carbon, including a custom roll cage padding (Sparco Fireproof) and a digital dash upgrade via a Motec C187 display with GPS lap timer.
